eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LAW ENFORCEMENT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Midland, TX; at 7:40 AM on JUN 12, 2026 Effective until 10:40 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Police incident near 4600 W Wall Street. Law enforcement is responding to a dangerous situation. Avoid the area completely to allow first responders to work safely. If you are already in the immediate area, seek shelter, lock doors, and stay inside. Follow directions from local authorities. Police incident near 4600 W Wall Street.
